title: Recent Articles | RL Peek Painting Tips and Blogs
description: Check out the most recent tips and articles from RL Peek Painting.
body: Drywall Repair After Ice Dams: What Painters Wish Homeowners Knew Heavy snow, sunny afternoons, and cold nights make ice dams a regular guest in Park City, UT. When they show up, water sneaks under shingles and finds its way to the nearest ceiling seam. That is when you notice a brown halo, a nail pop, or […] Read Our Home Tips Stain or Paint? Best Exterior Wood Treatments for High-UV, High-Elevation Homes At 7,000 feet and higher, Park City’s intense sun, big temperature swings, and long winters are hard on exterior wood. If you are weighing stain versus paint, the right call protects your deck, cedar siding, and trim while keeping your mountain home looking fresh. For many […] Read Our Home Tips Exterior Paint That Survives Park City Winters When you live in the mountains, your home faces challenges that go far beyond normal wear and tear. In Park City, freezing temperatures, intense UV exposure, and heavy snowfall all take a toll on exterior surfaces. Without the right paint and preparation, your siding can peel, […] Read Our Home Tips Coastal Color Fading: How Salt Air Impacts Exterior Paint and What You Can Do About It Living near the coast offers breathtaking views, soothing breezes, and a lifestyle many dream of-but it also means your home's exterior faces a constant assault from salt air and high humidity. One of the most important tasks is addressing the need for updating the look with house painting – inside and out. title: Contact RL Peek Painting Today!
description: Request a free estimate from RL Peek Painting. Contact us by phone or form for interior and exterior painting in Summit and Wasatch County.
body: First name * Please enter your first name. Last name * Please enter your last name. Email * Please enter a valid email address. Phone number * Please enter a valid phone number (e.g., 1234567890 or 123-456-7890). Street Address Line 1 * Please enter an address. Street Address Line 2 City Please enter a city. State Utah Postal Code Country US How did you hear about us? * Please select... Social Media Past Customer Referral Postcard Saw Your Trucks in the Neighborhood Yard Sign Google Search Facebook Instagram Other Who referred you? We want to send them a thank you! * Please enter who referred you. Job Type * Please select... Interior Exterior Interior and Exterior Services Requested * The protection of your privacy is important to us at RL Peek Painting. Rest assured that the personal information you provide us with will not be disclosed to other parties and will be used solely for the purpose of bringing you the best service possible. SUBMIT FORM 435-649-0158 Find Us! Schedule Your Estimate Close // --- API CONFIG --- const API_BASE_URL = "https://api.jobsuite.app"; const CONTRACTOR_ID = "af7500d8-c3b9-4414-b49d-9f50f79dcbab"; // --- HELPERS (alerts) --- function showError(message) { const alertBox = document.getElementById("customAlert"); alertBox.textContent = message; alertBox.classList.remove("success-alert"); alertBox.classList.add("error-alert"); alertBox.style.display = "block"; setTimeout(() => { alertBox.style.display = "none"; }, 3000); } function showSuccess(message) { const alertBox = document.getElementById("customAlert"); alertBox.textContent = message; alertBox.classList.remove("error-alert"); alertBox.classList.add("success-alert"); alertBox.style.display = "block"; setTimeout(() => { alertBox.style.display = "none"; }, 3000); } // DOM ready setup document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => { // Modal lazy-load handlers (guard in case element is missing) const bookingModalEl = document.getElementById('bookingModal'); if (bookingModalEl) { bookingModalEl.addEventListener('show.bs.modal', () => { const iframe = document.getElementById('calendarFrame'); if (iframe && !iframe.getAttribute('src')) { iframe.setAttribute('src', iframe.getAttribute('data-src')); } }); bookingModalEl.addEventListener('hidden.bs.modal', () => { const iframe = document.getElementById('calendarFrame'); if (iframe) iframe.removeAttribute('src'); }); } // Show/hide referral name field based on selection const referralSelect = document.getElementById('referralSource'); const referralNameContainer = document.getElementById('referralNameContainer'); const referralNameInput = document.getElementById('referralName'); if (referralSelect) { referralSelect.addEventListener('change', function () { if (this.value === 'referral') { referralNameContainer.style.display = 'block'; referralNameInput.setAttribute('required', ''); } else { referralNameContainer.style.display = 'none'; referralNameInput.removeAttribute('required'); referralNameInput.value = ''; } }); } // Submit handler const formEl = document.getElementById('contactForm'); formEl.addEventListener('submit', async function (e) { e.preventDefault(); this.classList.add('was-validated'); if (!this.checkValidity()) { e.stopPropagation(); return; } try { const payload = { contractor_id: CONTRACTOR_ID, first_name: document.getElementById('firstName').value, last_name: document.getElementById('lastName').value, email: document.getElementById('email').value, phone_number: document.getElementById('phone').value, address_street: document.getElementById('address1').value, address_street_2: document.getElementById('address2').value, address_city: document.getElementById('city').value, address_state: document.getElementById('state').value, address_zipcode: document.getElementById('postalCode').value, address_country: document.getElementById('country').value, services: document.getElementById('services').value, referral_source: document.getElementById('referralSource').value, referral_name: document.getElementById('referralName')?.value || "", job_type: document.getElementById('jobType').value, website: document.getElementById('website')?.value || "" }; const response = await fetch(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/v1/public/estimates`, { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(payload) }); if (!response.ok) { const errorData = await response.json().catch(() => ({})); throw new Error(errorData.detail || "Failed to submit form."); } // Reset & notify this.classList.remove('was-validated'); this.reset(); showSuccess("Form submitted successfully!"); // Show booking popup if (window.bootstrap && bookingModalEl) { new bootstrap.Modal(bookingModalEl).show(); } } catch (error) { console.error('Error processing form:', error); showError("There was an error submitting the form. Please try again."); } }); }); With Our RL Peek Painting Company!

title: Privacy Policy | RL Peek Painting
description: View the privacy policy for RL Peek Painting, providing quality services in Park City, UT.
body: Your privacy is very important to us. Accordingly, we have developed this Policy in order for you to understand how we collect, use, communicate and disclose and make use of personal information. The following outlines our privacy policy. Before or at the time of collecting personal information, we will identify the purposes for which information is being collected. We will collect and use of personal information solely with the objective of fulfilling those purposes specified by us and for other compatible purposes, unless we obtain the consent of the individual concerned or as required by law. We will only retain personal information as long as necessary for the fulfillment of those purposes. We will collect personal information by lawful and fair means and, where appropriate, with the knowledge or consent of the individual concerned. Personal data should be relevant to the purposes for which it is to be used, and, to the extent necessary for those purposes, should be accurate, complete, and up-to-date. We will protect personal information by reasonable security safeguards against loss or theft, as well as unauthorized access, disclosure, copying, use or modification. We will make readily available to customers information about our policies and practices relating to the management of personal information. With Our RL Peek Painting Company!

title: Painters wanted | RL Peek Painting | Park City, UT
description: We are looking for individuals interested in starting a career as a painting professional.
body: We are looking for individuals interested in starting a career as a painting professional. Believe it or not the opportunities and rewards available to Professional Painters are equal to or better than many other professions that require a college degree. Do you love hands on work and cringe at the thought of spending your work life behind a desk? Have you always wanted to work for a company that has the integrity to care deeply about its customers, employees, and quality of work? Our trained painting professionals take pride and joy in surprising our customers with a level of service and work they never expected. If you are the right person, this could be the company for you. The ideal candidate is an honest, dependable, hardworking individual interested in bettering themselves and the organization they are part of. We are looking for individuals who when faced with a problem can quickly and efficiently come up with a solution. A person that is well organized and enjoys interacting with customers and coworkers would fit well within our organization. Experience is preferred but not needed. Professional attitude and strong work ethic is necessary. REQUIREMENTS Must have reliable transportation Must be legally allowed to work in the United States Must have a great attitude and strong work ethics Must be responsible and committed to customer service Must have the ability to work independently and as a team Skill and experience in all aspects of residential painting, commercial painting is desired, but we will train the right people BENEFITS Competitive wages Full Time Employment and overtime based on work availability Great working environment and people Safety is our number one concern for both Employees and Clients alike Please fill out our form for more info. Ready for a Color Change? Contact Us for Expert Painting Services! title: About RL Peek Painting
description: Summit and Wasatch County painting contractor that offers interior and exterior painting services for your Utah home.
body: At RL Peek Painting, we take pride in being a trusted local painting company known for quality craftsmanship, reliable service, and long-lasting results. Since 1987, we have proudly served homeowners and businesses throughout Summit and Wasatch County, delivering professional interior and exterior painting, staining, and wood refinishing services with meticulous attention to detail. Whether you’re refreshing the interior of your home, improving curb appeal with a new exterior coat, or bringing new life to cabinetry and woodwork, our goal is always the same: provide a smooth process and a finished product that looks exceptional and stands the test of time. We use only high-quality paints, stains, and materials, paired with proven preparation methods and careful application. Our work is designed not only to enhance the appearance of your space, but also to provide the durability and protection your surfaces need for years to come. In 2026, RL Peek Painting proudly became a second-generation family-owned business as the company was passed down within the Peek family. With deep roots in the community, we remain committed to continuing the legacy of dependable service, honest communication, and outstanding customer care that has defined our reputation for decades. If you're looking for a trusted painting contractor, we’re here to help with interior painting, exterior painting, staining, drywall repair, cabinet refinishing, and specialty finishes—always tailored to your vision and your home. Why Choose RL Peek Painting? When you hire our team, you get more than a paint crew—you get professionals who care about doing the job right. From helping with color selection to detailed prep work and clean finishing lines, we focus on the details that create a truly polished result. Most importantly, we treat every home with respect and every customer like a neighbor. Ready for a Color Change? Contact Us for Expert Painting Services! Explore Our Services For Park City Interior Painting Interior Staining Drywall Repair Cabinetry & Wood Refinishing Exterior Painting Exterior Staining What Our Clients Are Saying You turned my house into a warm and inviting place for my family and friends to spend time together. Thank you to the most responsible and knowledgeable contractor I have ever work [...] There is an old time approach to the way you do business… appreciated the professional quality, friendly and honest service[...] We were very impressed with the outcome of the job you did for us. It was a pleasure to work with you and would highly recommend you to anyone looking for a high quality, detail or [...] Read More Reviews Call 435-649-0158 to request a free estimate, or complete our Online Request Form to get started.

faq.question: Why Choose RL Peek Painting?
faq.answer: When you hire our team, you get more than a paint crew—you get professionals who care about doing the job right. From helping with color selection to detailed prep work and clean finishing lines, we focus on the details that create a truly polished result. Most importantly, we treat every home with respect and every customer like a neighbor.
